Fields.Name: Enabled: Message ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the prompt message if this interaction is enabled.

Fields.Name: Failed: Message ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the prompt message if this interaction fails.

Fields.Name: Bypass Qualification Check: Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID that causes the qualification checks to be ignored for this interaction.

Fields.Name: Use Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance at which this interaction can be triggered. In metres.

Fields.Name: Use Action: Player Animation ID
Fields.Description: The player animation to use when this interaction is used by a player.

Fields.Name: Use Action: Character Animation ID
Fields.Description: The player animation to use when this interaction is used by a non-player character.

Fields.Name: Qualification ID: 1
Fields.Description:
The requirements to use this interaction, can either be a EquipParamGoods or SpEffectParam row.
spQualifiedType determines which type to reference.

Fields.Name: Qualification ID: 2
Fields.Description:
The requirements to use this interaction, can either be a EquipParamGoods or SpEffectParam row.
spQualifiedType2 determines which type to reference.

Fields.Name: Use: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon belonging to the attached object for this interaction that determines the 'action' position.

Fields.Name: Use: Object Animation ID
Fields.Description: The object animation to use when this interaction is used.

Fields.Name: Valid Player Angle
Fields.Description: The usage cone where a player can trigger this interaction (on the player's side). Effective angular difference between the player's orientation vector and the object's orientation vector. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Qualification Type: 1
Fields.Description: The requirement type to use for spQualifiedID.

Fields.Name: Qualification Type: 2
Fields.Description: The requirement type to use for spQualifiedID2.

Fields.Name: Valid Object Angle
Fields.Description: The usage cone where a player can trigger this interaction (on the object's side). Effective angular difference between the player's orientation vector and the object's orientation vector. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Character Attraction Type
Fields.Description: How the user character is attracted into the object during usage.

Fields.Name: Interaction Activation Timing
Fields.Description: The timing for the interaction activation.
